binaries.name: certutil.exe
binaries.tactic: Command and Control / Ingress Tool Transfer
binaries.description: Used to download files from remote URLs or decode Base64 payloads

binaries.name: mshta.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Executes malicious HTA files or inline VBScript/JavaScript

binaries.name: regsvr32.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Executes remote .sct COM scriptlets via Squiblydoo technique

binaries.name: rundll32.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Proxies execution of arbitrary DLLs or inline scripts

binaries.name: powershell.exe
binaries.description: Encoded or hidden PowerShell execution — classic RAT delivery

binaries.name: pwsh.exe
binaries.description: PowerShell Core abuse — same patterns as powershell.exe

binaries.name: wscript.exe
binaries.description: Executes malicious VBScript or JScript payloads

binaries.name: cscript.exe
binaries.description: Console-based VBScript/JScript execution, often used for stealthy payloads

binaries.name: msbuild.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Trusted Developer Utilities Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Compiles and executes inline C# code embedded in .proj files

binaries.name: installutil.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Executes arbitrary .NET assemblies via the Uninstall method

binaries.name: regasm.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Executes arbitrary code from a .NET DLL via COM registration

binaries.name: regsvcs.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Same abuse vector as regasm.exe — .NET DLL proxy execution

binaries.name: bitsadmin.exe
binaries.description: Downloads files or establishes persistent BITS jobs for C2 callbacks

binaries.name: wmic.exe
binaries.description: Spawns processes remotely, deletes VSS shadow copies, or runs XSL scripts

binaries.name: schtasks.exe
binaries.description: Creates persistence via scheduled tasks — common ransomware technique

binaries.name: at.exe
binaries.description: Legacy AT scheduler used for persistence on older systems

binaries.name: cmd.exe
binaries.description: Obfuscated cmd.exe execution chains — common payload staging technique

binaries.name: net.exe
binaries.description: Creates local admin accounts or maps shares for lateral movement

binaries.name: net1.exe
binaries.description: Same as net.exe — used to evade tooling that only monitors net.exe

binaries.name: xcopy.exe
binaries.description: Copies malware binaries to remote network shares

binaries.name: expand.exe
binaries.tactic: Command and Control / Ingress Tool Transfer
binaries.description: Decompresses and drops files from remote locations

binaries.name: esentutl.exe
binaries.description: Copies locked NTDS.dit or SAM hive for offline credential extraction

binaries.name: vssadmin.exe
binaries.description: Deletes VSS shadow copies — primary ransomware anti-recovery technique

binaries.name: wevtutil.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Indicator Removal on Host
binaries.description: Clears Windows event logs to destroy forensic evidence

binaries.name: nltest.exe
binaries.description: Enumerates domain trusts for lateral movement planning

binaries.name: dnscmd.exe
binaries.tactic: Persistence / Create or Modify System Process
binaries.description: Plants a malicious DLL into the DNS server as a persistence mechanism

binaries.name: odbcconf.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Registers and executes arbitrary DLLs via ODBC configuration

binaries.name: ieexec.exe
binaries.tactic: Command and Control / Ingress Tool Transfer
binaries.description: Downloads and executes a remote binary — a signed Microsoft binary

binaries.name: microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe
binaries.description: Compiles and runs arbitrary C# via Windows Workflow Foundation

binaries.name: cmstp.exe
binaries.tactic: Defense Evasion / Signed Binary Proxy Execution
binaries.description: Installs remote network profiles or executes COM scriptlets
